title: Blog Post Front-matter
description: Required metadata for every blog post draft. Author is fixed as Ask Ryno and injected by build.mjs.

title.description: Human-readable post title. Used in <title>, OG, JSON-LD.

slug.description: URL-safe slug. Output goes to src/blog/<slug>/index.html → ryno.tools/blog/<slug>/.

description.description: Meta description (~155 chars). Used in <meta name=description>, OG, JSON-LD.

track.description: The quiz track this post maps to. Drives the quiz CTA deep-link and track badge color.

tags.description: Topic tags (from data-pipeline/taxonomy.json or blog-specific). Used for related posts.

dateModified.description: ISO date string. Set to datePublished if not updated.

excerpt.description: Short excerpt for blog index cards.

sources.description: Authoritative sources used. Every cited claim must map to a listed source. Readers use these to verify.

status.description: draft = WIP; ready = passes validate, awaiting review; published = in src/blog/.
